title: Beautified Vanilla
description: A modpack that puts perfectly tweaked and selected mods, resource packs and shaders to create a completely unparalleled Minecraft experience!
body:
A Modpack that puts perfectly tweaked and selected mods, resource packs and shaders to create a completely unparalleled Minecraft experience - While maintaining wonderful performance at all times.

**I've been working on making sure this modpack looks beautiful while still providing exceptional performance.**

**Current Version:**

## 1.1.1

As I play Minecraft, I like to add, remove, and tweak different Mods, Shaders and Resource Packs. I've decided to start a Modpack of all the mods that I use on a day-to-day basis. Beautified Vanilla is a modified version of "Fabulously Optimised" _(See below for links)_ with a heavy emphasis on making Minecraft look and feel gorgeous to play, without changing the gameplay - besides a few QOL tweaks. I have tweaked all the mods to squeeze as much performance out of them as I can without reducing visual quality at all. I hope you enjoy Beautified Vanilla!

Credits:

This is a heavily modified version of the "Fabulously Optimised" Modpack, the link can be found here: [https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)
